modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Changing default email account in Outlook to a shared address

full_description_text:  
User is trying to set a Department email account as the default in Outlook. Currently, their personal email address is set as the default. They need assistance with this change.
short_description: Changing default email account in Outlook to a shared address
description: User is trying to set a Department email account as the default in Outlook. Currently, their personal email address is set as the default. They need assistance with this change.
